title: erigeron lachnocephalus
intro: Erigeron lachnocephalus, also known as the flat-top fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Erigeron lachnocephalus are thought to include reduced inflammation and improved wound healing, as well as potential antimicrobial and antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of Erigeron lachnocephalus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
